seo.title: Private Event Venue Little Italy San Diego | Bachelorette & Birthday | Coco Maya
seo.description: San Diego's top private event venue in Little Italy. Bachelorette parties, birthday dinners, rehearsal dinners & corporate events at Coco Maya rooftop. {{street}}, 92101.

hero.label: Group Bookings
hero.title: Private Events in San Diego

hero.imageAlt: Private event dining at Coco Maya Little Italy San Diego

intro.eyebrow: Rooftop Event Venue · Little Italy San Diego
intro.title: Private Event Venue in Little Italy San Diego
intro.body1: Coco Maya is one of San Diego most distinctive venues. The glass atrium bar, the elevated outdoor patio, the tropical mural dining room — each space has its own character and can be configured for groups of any size.
intro.body2: We work with you on custom menus, drink packages, decor, and anything else that makes your event feel like yours. Little Italy provides the backdrop. We handle the rest.
intro.imageAlt: Private event dining room at Coco Maya — rooftop venue Little Italy San Diego

types.title: Every occasion deserves a space worth remembering.

process.title: From first inquiry to your event

atmosphere.imageAlt: Rooftop patio at Coco Maya — private event venue in Little Italy San Diego
atmosphere.line: Little Italy as your backdrop. Every single night.

inquiry.title: Tell us about your event
inquiry.body: Email us with your date, expected headcount, and the type of event. We will put together a custom proposal within 24 hours.
sellingPoints: Indoor, patio, or full venue options
AV, decor, and vendor coordination available

emailCard.label: Email Us
emailCard.title: Start the conversation
emailCard.body: Send us your event details and we will respond within 24 hours with availability and initial pricing.

phoneCard.label: Call Us
phoneCard.title: Talk to someone now
phoneCard.body: Prefer to talk through the details? Call us directly during business hours and we will get you sorted.

form.label: Or Send Us Your Details
form.subtitle: Prefer to send details directly? Share your date, headcount, and event type and we'll follow up within 24 hours.

cta.title: Ready to Start Planning?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you have in mind. We will put together a package that works for your group.
